nodes.title: France Before the Revolution
nodes.description: Understand how people lived in France before the revolution and the social structure.

nodes.title: The Three Estates
nodes.description: Learn about the three groups in society and their roles.

nodes.title: Causes of the Revolution
nodes.description: Understand why people became unhappy and demanded change.

nodes.title: Storming of the Bastille
nodes.description: Learn about the important event that started the revolution.

nodes.title: End of Monarchy
nodes.description: Understand how the king lost power and what happened next.

nodes.title: Results of the Revolution
nodes.description: Learn how the revolution changed France and its people.
